name: n8n Workflow Execution Logger to PostgreSQL

nodes.name: Fetch n8n Executions
nodes.notes: Fetches recent workflow executions from n8n REST API. Requires Basic Auth or API Key credentials.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO workflow_executions (workflow_id, workflow_name, status, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, error)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

nodes.name: Insert to PostgreSQL
nodes.notes: Requires PostgreSQL credentials. Table: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_executions (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, workflow_id VARCHAR(255), workflow_name VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50), started_at TIMESTAMP, finished_at TIMESTAMP, duration_ms INTEGER, error TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
